title: Curtain Call
prompt: There may be an encore… Do you want more?
notes: Published closing text: “We have had fun with the 10,000 hour series. We have learned a lot and made many friends. We are going to be retiring this series for now. We have some fun stuff coming - follow us for more. Here is a collection of the series for those interested.” It closes with “One last time I need you to roar!” and “I came, I saw, I conquered. What are you waiting for?”

inspiration.song: In the End — live performance as embedded
